title: Inside the AI ad boom at Google and Meta.
description:
All the ad people I know keep saying “the content is the targeting” lately, and now I know why: Google and Meta are using AI to flip the online ad model upside down. Big dive in the NYT:
> But the real business breakthroughs have come from targeting. It used to be that an advertiser would say, for example, “I want to target women in New York between the ages of 24 and 35.” Now it’s the opposite: Meta and Google are using A.I. to recommend customers the brands should be going after.
[Link: Behind the A.I. Boom, a Boring Business Is Soaring With Better Ads | https://www.nytimes.com/2026/04/29/technology/ai-artificial-intelligence-ad-boom.html | The New York Times]
content:

title: Inside the Plot to Cover Europe with Gas-Powered AI Data Centres

title: Maharashtra Approves AI Policy 2026 Targeting ₹10,000 Cr Investment And 1.5 Lakh Jobs By 2031
description: Maharashtra has approved its AI Policy 2026, aiming to attract ₹10,000 crore in investments and generate over 1.5 lakh jobs by 2031. The plan includes a ₹500 crore startup fund, AI infrastructure, and skill training for 2 lakh youth, positioning the state as a hub for responsible and inclusive artificial intelligence growth.
content: Mumbai: In a significant step towards strengthening its digital economy, the Maharashtra government has announced the ‘Maharashtra AI Policy 2026’, aimed at accelerating the adoption of artificial intelligence across industries, governance and public... [3864 chars]

title: Apple Plans a Siri Camera Mode and Upgraded Visual AI in iOS 27
description: Apple Inc. is planning to embed artificial intelligence more deeply into the iPhone’s camera app, adding a new Siri mode alongside the standard photo and video options in its upcoming iOS 27 operating system.

title: Taylor Swift files trademark applications for her voice and likeness reportedly to curb AI threats
description: Taylor Swift filed three new trademark applications with the U.S. Patent & Trademark Office, a move one legal expert theorizes it is to protect her voice and image from potential misuse through artificial intelligence.
content:
NEW YORK (AP) — Taylor Swift filed three new trademark applications with the U.S. Patent & Trademark Office, a move one legal expert theorizes it is to protect her voice and image from potential misuse through artificial intelligence.

title: AI will soon grade 911 dispatcher performance in Long Beach
description: The artificial intelligence technology will evaluate call recordings based on standards set by dispatch center supervisors.
content:
Long Beach soon will use artificial intelligence to help evaluate how dispatchers respond to 911 calls.
